role.zh: 战略 / 产品 / 交付

bio.zh: 连续创业者, 前某智能家居厂商技术负责人。相信空间智能会改变养老、医疗、居住的底层范式。
bio.en: Serial founder, former head of engineering at a smart-home vendor. Believes spatial intelligence will change the base paradigm of care, medicine and living.

role.zh: 系统架构 / 端侧推理

bio.zh: 长期 AI 基础设施背景, 负责 AIOS 的整体架构与可信执行链路设计。
bio.en: Long-time AI infrastructure background, leads the overall AIOS architecture and the design of the trusted execution path.

role.zh: 多模态感知 / 端侧模型

bio.zh: 多模态感知与因果推理方向博士, 主导前瞻研究路线与学术合作。
bio.en: PhD in multimodal sensing and causal reasoning. Leads the frontier research roadmap and academic collaborations.

role.zh: B+G 机构交付 / 试点 / 运维

bio.zh: 10 年医疗 / 养老系统交付经验, 带队完成多地机构级试点与等保合规支撑。
bio.en: 10 years of healthcare and eldercare delivery. Led multi-region facility pilots and MLPS compliance engagements.

role.zh: 品牌 / UI / 空间交互

bio.zh: 前高端消费品牌设计师, 负责循星的空间智能视觉语言与交互范式。
bio.en: Former senior designer at premium consumer brands. Owns the spatial-intelligence visual and interaction language.

role.zh: 行业合作 / 设备厂商 / 学术

bio.zh: 对接养老、医疗、设备厂商与高校的战略合作, 推动联邦画像市场的机构间协议。
bio.en: Runs strategic partnerships with care facilities, hospitals, device vendors and universities. Drives inter-institution federation protocols.

desc.zh: 跨品牌设备互操作协议(公开生态)
开源智能家居生态(公开生态)

name.zh: 端侧 AI 推理硬件

desc.zh: 面向不同算力档位的本地推理芯片与平台
desc.en: Local inference silicon and platforms across compute tiers

desc.zh: 在端侧多模态、可信 AI、因果记忆方向的联合研究
desc.en: Joint research on on-device multimodal sensing, trustworthy AI, and causal memory

desc.zh: 地方民政与机构照护体系试点合作
desc.en: Pilots with local civil-affairs and care systems
